title: Microsoft plans to close or spin off several Xbox studios, including Double Fine, Ninja Theory, and Compulsion
summary: Reports indicate that the new Xbox CEO is restructuring the division, with studios negotiating to avoid closure.

title: Steam Next Fest offers hundreds of demos and surpasses a thousand games with generative AI
summary: Steam's demo event features a large number of titles, including many with generative AI tags, and players have limited time to try them.

title: Switch system update finally speeds up the original eShop
summary: A new update for Nintendo Switch fixes the eShop's slowness issue, improving the browsing experience.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update with the true ending and Switch 2 improvements
summary: Update 1.1.11 adds the true ending mission, additional content, and portable optimizations.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces June 2026 games, including EA Sports FC 26 and Call of Duty
summary: The subscription service adds new titles while eight others leave the catalog at the end of the month.

title: Don't Nod, creator of Life is Strange, runs out of money and seeks urgent funding
summary: The French developer runs out of cash by November and could decide its future in the coming hours.

title: Mark Gordon leaves Treyarch's leadership after 22 years in Call of Duty
summary: The veteran executive leaves the Call of Duty studio to focus on his next professional chapter.

title: Overwatch introduces Shion, a new DPS hero inspired by Devil May Cry and John Wick
summary: The third season includes this hero on a motorcycle with a style meter similar to DMC's.

title: Hellraiser: Revival confirms October launch with a violent trailer
summary: The horror game based on Clive Barker's work combines first-person shooting and supernatural powers.

title: Mark Hamill joins the cast of the Twisted Metal series in a key role
summary: The Star Wars actor will play a familiar character in the second season of the Peacock show.

title: Toy Story 5 surprises with a return to Pixar's golden age
summary: Critics highlight that the film is the most interesting thing in the saga in 16 years.

title: Sony patents a controller with buttons that harden while playing
summary: The patent describes a controller that adjusts button hardness based on on-screen action.

title: Blizzard sues World of Warcraft private server for massive infringement
summary: The company accuses the server of making millions of dollars by violating its intellectual property rights.

title: EA introduces billboards inside its games as a new way to connect with audiences
summary: The company announces it will transform in-game advertising, while EA Sports FC opens the door to unconventional ads.

title: UK plans to ban social media and streaming platforms for under-16s
summary: The measure aims to protect children, but raises doubts about its effectiveness and impact on video games.

title: Former Naughty Dog artist defends the studio's silence on its exclusive Intergalactic
summary: The developer explains why they didn't show the sci-fi game at Summer Game Fest.

title: The Hunt for Gollum introduces Seren, the new character played by Anya Taylor-Joy
summary: The character has sparked controversy among fans of Tolkien and The Lord of the Rings.

title: Take-Two confirms GTA 6 release date and explains its delay
summary: Take-Two CEO reiterates that the game will arrive in fall 2025 and clarifies reasons for its prolonged development.

title: Meccha Chameleon, the stealth and painting game, becomes a party phenomenon
summary: The title has sold a million copies and is hailed as the next great party game.

title: Mole is a horror simulator where you control a drill ship with religious symbolism
summary: Developed by former GTFO creators, the game features a tense atmosphere and a deep story.
